title: Cozy Contraptions SMP
description: A warm, vanilla-plus world for builders and chill explorers. Enjoy lush worldgen, cozy lifestyle mods, and a light sprinkle of Create-powered contraptions
body:
# Cozy Vanilla+ • Relaxed Progression • Lite Tech (Create)
This modpack keeps Minecraft feeling familiar while expanding the world with new places to discover, better villages, and gentle quality-of-life upgrades. Build serene towns, run a rustic kitchen, snap photos of your adventures, and (when inspiration strikes) wire up playful Create contraptions—without overwhelming tech trees or grindy progression.

## What’s Inside
### World & Exploration
- **Terrain & biomes:** Terralith / Tectonic worldgen (both included), Hybrid Aquatic, Better End Sky, Better End Cities (vanilla style).
- **Structures & dungeons:** YUNG’s full suite (Mineshafts, Strongholds, Temples, Fortresses, Monuments, etc.), Towns & Towers, Dungeons & Taverns, Amplified Nether.
- **Dimensions & curiosities:** The Bumblezone for honey-soaked sidequests, Enderman Overhaul for fresh End variety.
- Travel flair: Traveler’s Titles, Waystones, Small Ships, Nifty Carts—wander in style.

### Cozy Life, Food & Decor
- **Culinary comforts:** Farmer’s Delight + Cultural/Expanded/Nethers/Oceans Delight add-ons, plus the Let’s Do series (Bakery, Brewery, Vinery, Candlelight, Meadow, Beach Party, Herbal Brews) for wholesome roleplay.
- **Homebuilding:** Handcrafted, Chipped, Medieval Decoration, Visual Workbench—make every nook feel lived-in.
- **Memories:** Exposure (camera) + CameraUtils to catalog your journey.

### Lite Tech & Building Helpers
- Create (Fabric) with Create Deco & Enchantment Industry for tasteful automation and fun toys.
- Alloy Forgery for simple metal workflows.
- **Creative-friendly tools:** Creative Menu Tweaks, Copycats, Armor Poser, Cosmetic Armor, Universal Bonemeal, Trowel.

### Villages, Critters & Companions
- **Livelier world:** VillagersPlus, Friends & Foes, Critters & Companions, Wildlife.
- **Comfort & safety:** Comforts (sleeping bags), Gravestones, Secure Crops, AntiCreeper (gentler explosions).

### UI, QoL & Utilities
- **Maps & info:** Xaero’s Minimap + World Map, Better Stats, Clean F3, Appleskin, Inventory Sorter, Shulker Box Tooltip, Chat Heads, Trade Cycling.
- **Social:** Simple Voice Chat for easy server nights.
- **Little delights:** Not Enough Animations, Eating Animation, Ambient Sounds, Sound Physics Remastered, Visuality, LambDynamicLights, Talk Bubbles.

### Performance Suite (Client & Server Friendly)
- **Core:** Sodium + Indium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Starlight, ModernFix, ImmediatelyFast, Dynamic FPS, BadOptimizations, EntityCulling, More/Cull Less Leaves, Memory Leak Fix, Reese’s Sodium Options.
- Smooth frames, faster loads—perfect for relaxed, scenic play.

### Progression & Playstyle
- **Difficulty:** Relaxed. No gated tech tiers; Create is optional and approachable.
- **Play loop:** Explore → settle a cozy town → cook, decorate, and complete gentle side-projects → tinker with small Create builds when you feel like it.
- **Exploration goals:** Seek YUNG’s structures, Bumblezone portals, End/Nether revamps, and shoreline adventures with Small Ships.
  
### Recommended Settings
- **World type:** Use Terralith (default) or Tectonic—both are included.
- **View distance:** 10–12; Simulation distance: 8 for performance.
- Shaders (optional): Iris is included—enable any Iris-compatible shader if your PC can handle it.
- **Minimap:** Enable cave/waypoint features to taste; pair with Waystones for comfy travel.

### Install Notes
- **Platform:** Fabric 1.20.1
- APIs/Libs included: Fabric API, Architectury, GeckoLib, Trinkets, Cloth Config, YUNG’s API, TerraBlender, etc.
- **First launch:** Let the pack load fully once; performance mods will compile caches.

### Server Notes
- **Great for small servers:** Simple Voice Chat included.
- **Memory:** 6–8 GB RAM recommended for client and server.
- **Chunk pregen:** Use Chunky + ChunkyBorder before inviting friends to reduce lag.
- **Backups:** Consider regular world backups (especially with large worldgen).

### Credits
Huge thanks to all mod authors—highlights include: Terralith, Tectonic, YUNG’s mods, Towns & Towers, Hybrid Aquatic, Bumblezone, Farmer’s Delight (+ add-ons), Let’s Do series, Handcrafted, Chipped, Create (Fabric) + add-ons, Xaero’s maps, Waystones, Small Ships, Comforts, Gravestones, Exposure, Simple Voice Chat, and the Sodium/Lithium/FerriteCore/Starlight/ModernFix performance stack.
